Lumify
Table of Contents

Class ChatHub

Namespace
lumify.api.Hubs
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

SignalR hub for real-time chat and user presence. Tracks each user's active connections via the presence service, broadcasts presence changes to all clients, and handles joining rooms, leaving rooms and sending messages. Requires an authenticated connection.

[Authorize]
public class ChatHub : Hub
Inheritance
object
Hub
ChatHub

Remarks

Presence is connection-counted: a user is online while at least one connection is open. Chat rooms are SignalR groups keyed by room ID; messages are persisted before being broadcast to the room.

Constructors

ChatHub(IPresenceService, LumifyDbContext)

Creates the hub with its injected presence service and database context.

public ChatHub(IPresenceService presenceService, LumifyDbContext db)

Parameters

presenceService IPresenceService
db LumifyDbContext

Methods

JoinRoom(string)

Adds the caller's connection to a chat room (SignalR group) so it receives that room's messages. No-op if roomID is empty.

public Task JoinRoom(string roomID)

Parameters

roomID string

The room to join.

Returns

Task

LeaveRoom(string)

Removes the caller's connection from a chat room (SignalR group). No-op if roomID is empty.

public Task LeaveRoom(string roomID)

Parameters

roomID string

The room to leave.

Returns

Task

OnConnectedAsync()

Called when a client connects: registers the connection with the presence service and broadcasts a PresenceChanged event marking the user online.

public override Task OnConnectedAsync()

Returns

Task

OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception?)

Called when a client disconnects: removes the connection from the presence service and broadcasts a PresenceChanged event with the user's recomputed status (offline once their last connection closes).

public override Task OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception? exception)

Parameters

exception Exception

The error that caused the disconnect, if any.

Returns

Task

SendMessage(string, string)

Persists a chat message from the current user and broadcasts it to everyone in the room as a MessageReceived event. Silently ignores empty room/content or an unauthenticated caller.

public Task SendMessage(string roomID, string content)

Parameters

roomID string

The room to post to.

content string

The message text.

Returns

Task
